title: SR 13-23: Supervisory Letter SR 13-23 on         Risk Transfer Considerations When Assessing Capital Adequacy – Supplemental Guidance on Consolidated Supervision Framework for Large Financial Institutions (SR letter 12-17/CA letter 12-14)  -- December 20, 2013
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 13-23 on         Risk Transfer Considerations When Assessing Capital Adequacy – Supplemental Guidance on Consolidated Supervision Framework for Large Financial Institutions (SR letter 12-17/CA letter 12-14)  -- December 20, 2013
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 13-23
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to large financial institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve and does not apply to community banking organizations, which are defined as institutions with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO CERTAIN INSTITUTIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
bm25_text: SR 13-23 Supervisory Letter SR 13-23 on         Risk Transfer Considerations When Assessing Capital Adequacy – Supplemental Guidance on Consolidated Supervision Framework for Large Financial Institutions (SR letter 12-17/CA letter 12-14)  -- December 20, 2013 This guidance applies to large financial institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve and does not apply to community banking organizations, which are defined as institutions with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.
